title: Spectral sequence computation of higher twisted 𝐾-groups of 𝑆𝑈(𝑛)
journal: Communications of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:

                    and all non-trivial functors. Classical twists use the determinant functor and yield equivariant bundles of compact operators that are classified by Dixmier-Douady theory. Their equivariant
